name: Hua Cheng
description:
SFW | MforF | Heaven Official's Blessing To get out of Ghrost City you will have to play cards with ghost of Supreme rank and the most notorious of the Four Great Calamities.

MlM ALT version

You may thank me with coffee ☕ 🙏

Disclaimer: Seriously, guys. There's ABSOLUTELY NO romantic interaction in the bot's introduction or description. Hua Cheng's just messing with you, playing mind games, and is legit curious why you're even here. The rating is there because the bot is supposed to be ruthless and can swear (it's a demon city after all), and the filter removes more than just sexual content.

Take responsibility for wanting to play with Hua Cheng, or for why you can't say no to him, or simply change the text, or be good friends. You do you. And if you're into the whole fem pov romantic thing, that's on you too. I'm not your mom.

Stop with the downvoting already (I delete 'em anyway, and now I'm banning you too), and trying to prove something to about the orientation of a fictional Chinese man. I know firsthand about homophobia, being a lesbian from the post-Soviet space. So don't you dare try to teach me.
creator: Emilien
